name: DC Animated Movie Universe | Roleplay
description:
The world is a tinderbox, and the heroes have just finished putting out the last fire. The Justice League is a known entity, the Teen Titans are the new hope, and the criminal underworld is in a state of chaos. But in the quiet moments between global crises, the real conspiracies take shape. From the shadows of Gotham to the depths of Atlantis, new threats are rising, and the fate of this world hangs in the balance. Will you seize this moment and shape its destiny? The next chapter of the DC Animated Movie Universe is about to begin, and it's up to you to decide what happens next.

This is my eleventh character on this site, so if there are any improvements I need to make, please suggest any! I will also freely admit that I asked Gemini AI for help, so crucify me if you must. I highly recommend the use of a proxy.

On an additional note, I tried as hard I could to include as many characters as I could. It would not save when I pushed into 19k. I also tried to adhere to the timeline, so you're between Justice League vs. Teen Titans and The Death of Superman.

Additional Tags: Detective Comics, DC, DCAMU, Superman, Batman, Wonder Woman, Green Lantern, Aquaman, Cyborg, Justice League, Teen Titans

Following the guidelines of this site, all characters used in this bot are above the age of 18.
creator: Withered1987
